rule.descr: Default allow LAN to any rule
Default allow LAN IPv6 to any rule

revision.description: admin@192.168.122.1 (Local Database): Firewall: Rules - saved/edited a firewall rule.

package.name: squid3
package.descr: High performance web proxy cache (3.4 branch). It combines Squid as a proxy server with its capabilities of acting as a HTTP / HTTPS reverse proxy.<br /> It includes an Exchange-Web-Access (OWA) Assistant, SSL filtering and antivirus integration via C-ICAP.

package.name: OpenVPN Client Export Utility
package.descr: Allows a pre-configured OpenVPN Windows Client or Mac OS X's Viscosity configuration bundle to be exported directly from pfSense.

package.name: suricata
package.descr: High Performance Network IDS, IPS and Security Monitoring engine by OISF.

menu.name: Squid Reverse Proxy
menu.tooltiptext: Modify the reverse proxy server settings

service.name: c-icap
service.description: ICAP Interface for Squid and ClamAV integration

rule.eve_log_http_extended_headers: accept, accept-charset, accept-datetime, accept-encoding, accept-language, accept-range, age, allow, authorization, cache-control, connection, content-encoding, content-language, content-length, content-location, content-md5, content-range, content-type, cookie, date, dnt, etags, from, last-modified, link, location, max-forwards, origin, pragma, proxy-authenticate, proxy-authorization, range, referrer, refresh, retry-after, server, set-cookie, te, trailer, transfer-encoding, upgrade, vary, via, warning, www-authenticate, x-authenticated-user, x-flash-version, x-forwarded-proto, x-requested-with
